introSection:
Fort YesterLand is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at YesterLand Farm in Canton, Texas, USA.

The ride opened in 2013 under the name Range, but was later renamed to Fort YesterLand.
fullText:
Fort YesterLand is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at YesterLand Farm in Canton, Texas, USA.

The ride opened in 2013 under the name Range, but was later renamed to Fort YesterLand.
